hero.name: Hero Banner
hero.summary: The hero sets tone, urgency and trust before the visitor scrolls.
hero.pitch: Every trade site lives or dies on the first screen. LeadPages heroes pair a bold headline with highlighted urgency text, supporting sub-copy and icon badges — built for local service searches on mobile.

features.title: Highlight text support
features.text: Colour a key phrase like "We'll clear it today" so it pops against the headline.

features.title: Trust badge row
features.text: Up to four icon badges (licensed, insured, same-day) sit directly under the copy.

features.title: Mobile-first typography
features.text: Headlines scale cleanly on phones where most emergency trade searches happen.

partnerBenefits.title: Works for every trade
partnerBenefits.text: Swap defaults for plumbers, sparkies or landscapers and publish in minutes.

partnerBenefits.title: Layout-aware
partnerBenefits.text: Pairs with Quote First, Emergency Response and every layout preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Client self-service
partnerBenefits.text: Owners update their own headline after launch — fewer post-launch edits for partners.

heroSlider.name: Hero Image Slider
heroSlider.tagline: Rotating image hero with overlay copy and CTAs
heroSlider.summary: A full-width slider for visual trades — roofing, landscaping, building.
heroSlider.pitch: Show multiple jobs or offers in rotation without rebuilding the page. Each slide carries its own headline, highlight, sub-text and dual CTAs with fade or slide transitions.

features.title: Multiple slides
features.text: Add, reorder and edit slides — each with its own image, copy and button actions.

features.title: Overlay controls
features.text: Adjust overlay strength, text alignment and min height for desktop vs mobile.

features.title: Autoplay & transitions
features.text: Fade or slide transitions with configurable autoplay timing.

partnerBenefits.title: Premium upsell
partnerBenefits.text: Visual trades pay more for slider heroes — easy margin for partners.

partnerBenefits.title: Image-led selling
partnerBenefits.text: Perfect for builders, painters and landscapers who sell with photos.

partnerBenefits.title: Command Centre editing
partnerBenefits.text: Partners swap slides and copy without touching HTML or CSS.

heroBeforeAfter.name: Hero Before/After
heroBeforeAfter.summary: Let visitors swipe between before and after in the hero itself.
heroBeforeAfter.pitch: The highest-impact proof for renovation, rendering, cleaning and landscaping trades. A draggable wipe sits in the hero zone so proof lands before the scroll.

features.title: Drag-to-reveal wipe
features.text: Visitors interact with a before/after slider — higher engagement than static images.

features.title: Labels & caption
features.text: Custom before/after labels plus a title and caption under the wipe.

features.title: Hero placement
features.text: Sits in the primary viewport — not buried halfway down the page.

partnerBenefits.title: High-ticket trades
partnerBenefits.text: Ideal for bathroom, kitchen, rendering and pressure-washing partners.

partnerBenefits.title: Interactive demo
partnerBenefits.text: Playground shows the real wipe component — not a screenshot.

partnerBenefits.title: Differentiator
partnerBenefits.text: Few competitor site builders offer hero-level before/after out of the box.

splitHero.name: Split Hero
splitHero.tagline: Two-column hero with live activity feed
splitHero.summary: Pair a bold headline with a scrolling feed of recent jobs.
splitHero.pitch: Built for the Social Proof Feed layout. The left column sells; the right column shows real-time-style job activity so visitors feel the business is busy and trusted.

features.title: Dual-column layout
features.text: Headline, highlight text and dual CTAs on the left; activity feed on the right.

features.title: Live activity lines
features.text: Configurable feed items with job text and time labels.

features.title: Brand colours
features.text: Pipe and hi-vis tokens flow from the site theme automatically.

partnerBenefits.title: Social proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Core component of the high-converting Social Proof Feed page preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Urgency without hype
partnerBenefits.text: Shows activity, not fake countdown timers — authentic for tradies.

partnerBenefits.title: Quick setup
partnerBenefits.text: Feed items are list-editable like every other section.

services.name: Services Grid
services.tagline: Icon cards for every service you offer
services.summary: List what you fix, install or maintain in scannable cards.
services.pitch: The workhorse section for every trade site. Icon cards with title and short body copy — visitors scan services in seconds and jump to quote or call.

features.title: Icon per service
features.text: Choose from the shared icon library — no image hunting required.

features.title: Toggle individual cards
features.text: Turn services on/off without deleting content — handy for seasonal offers.

features.title: Grid layout
features.text: Responsive card grid that stacks cleanly on mobile.

partnerBenefits.title: SEO-friendly copy
partnerBenefits.text: Partners add suburb and trade keywords in service descriptions.

partnerBenefits.title: Fast to populate
partnerBenefits.text: Defaults seed four common services; partners add or trim in minutes.

partnerBenefits.title: Pairs with quote form
partnerBenefits.text: Works with every layout — usually sits below the hero.

why.name: Why Choose Us
why.tagline: Numbered reasons or icon points that build trust
why.summary: Answer "why you?" before the visitor compares competitors.
why.pitch: Four proof points with icons or numbers — upfront pricing, on-time arrival, reviews count, years in business. Reduces bounce from comparison shoppers.

features.title: Icon or number mode
features.text: Use icons for visual trades or numbered steps for process-focused messaging.

features.title: Four-up grid
features.text: Clean responsive grid — two columns on tablet, one on phone.

features.title: Token support
features.text: {{businessName}} token in the eyebrow auto-fills from site settings.

partnerBenefits.title: Objection handling
partnerBenefits.text: Partners pre-empt price, reliability and experience objections.

partnerBenefits.title: Reusable across niches
partnerBenefits.text: Same structure works for plumbers, cleaners and builders alike.

partnerBenefits.title: Low edit burden
partnerBenefits.text: Most partners tweak four lines and publish.

area.name: Service Area Copy
area.tagline: Paragraph plus suburb list for local SEO
area.summary: Tell visitors exactly where you work.
area.pitch: Combines a short area paragraph with a suburb list — critical for local SEO and paid search quality scores. Visitors self-qualify before they call.

features.title: Suburb list
features.text: Editable list of suburbs — one per line in the Command Centre.

features.title: Intro paragraph
features.text: Set the geographic story — ACT-wide, metro, or hyper-local.

features.title: Eyebrow + heading
features.text: Standard section head pattern matches the rest of the trade template.

partnerBenefits.title: Local SEO
partnerBenefits.text: Partners target exact suburbs they want to rank and advertise in.

partnerBenefits.title: Reduces junk leads
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors outside the area self-filter before submitting the form.

partnerBenefits.title: Quick wins
partnerBenefits.text: Defaults include Canberra suburbs — swap for any market.

reviews.name: Reviews Wall
reviews.tagline: Full review cards with source attribution
reviews.summary: Show the full wall of customer quotes.
reviews.pitch: Three or more review cards with name, quote and source (Google, Facebook, hipages). Complements Review Highlights for partners who want depth over snippets.

features.title: Source badges
features.text: Show Google, Facebook or hipages attribution per review.

features.title: Unlimited list
features.text: Add as many reviews as needed — list editor in Command Centre.

features.title: Long-form quotes
features.text: Textarea per review for full testimonial copy.

partnerBenefits.title: Trust stacking
partnerBenefits.text: Pairs with Review Highlights and Proof Stream on proof-heavy layouts.

partnerBenefits.title: Easy refresh
partnerBenefits.text: Partners add new reviews after every good job.

partnerBenefits.title: Social proof SEO
partnerBenefits.text: User-generated language helps long-tail local search.

faq.name: FAQ Accordion
faq.tagline: Collapsible questions that cut support calls
faq.summary: Answer the questions every visitor asks before they call.
faq.pitch: Accordion FAQ reduces phone time spent on pricing, licensing, areas and hours. Each item is a question plus answer — expandable on click.

features.title: Accordion UI
features.text: Native details/summary accordion — accessible and mobile-friendly.

features.title: Unlimited Q&As
features.text: Add, reorder and toggle FAQ items from the list editor.

features.title: Section headings
features.text: Eyebrow and heading match the site design system.

partnerBenefits.title: Fewer tire-kickers
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors self-answer "are you licensed?" before calling.

partnerBenefits.title: Paid search quality
partnerBenefits.text: FAQ content supports ad landing page relevance.

partnerBenefits.title: Fast defaults
partnerBenefits.text: Seed four common plumbing FAQs — swap for any trade.

quote.name: Quote Form
quote.tagline: Lead capture form with configurable fields
quote.summary: Turn visitors into callbacks — the primary conversion point.
quote.pitch: Configurable quote form with field labels, job-type options and success message. Submissions flow to the partner CRM and site owner inbox.

features.title: Field labels
features.text: Rename every label — Name, Phone, Suburb, Job type — per client.

features.title: Job type options
features.text: Dropdown options editable as a list — blocked drain, hot water, etc.

features.title: Success state
features.text: Custom success title and message after submit.

partnerBenefits.title: CRM integration
partnerBenefits.text: Leads land in LeadPages CRM with source attribution.

partnerBenefits.title: Quote First layout
partnerBenefits.text: Can sit beside the hero for paid-traffic landing pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Mobile optimised
partnerBenefits.text: Large touch targets and single-column layout on phones.

beforeAfter.name: Before & After Gallery
beforeAfter.summary: Static before/after pairs for proof-heavy pages.
beforeAfter.pitch: Photo Proof layout centrepiece. Multiple before/after pairs with title, caption and optional image URLs — ideal when you have great job photos.

features.title: Multiple pairs
features.text: Add unlimited before/after sets via the list editor.

features.title: Captions per pair
features.text: Title and caption explain the job scope and suburb.

features.title: Image URLs
features.text: Optional before and after images — Cloudinary or external URLs.

partnerBenefits.title: Visual trades
partnerBenefits.text: Essential for painters, renderers, cleaners and renovators.

partnerBenefits.title: Photo Proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Enabled automatically in the Photo Proof page preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Upsell photography
partnerBenefits.text: Partners can bundle photo day + site update as a service.

responseCards.name: Response Cards
responseCards.summary: Three bold cards that answer "what happens when I call?"
responseCards.pitch: Emergency Response layout feature. Cards like "60-min response", "Answer every call" and "Quote before we start" — reduces anxiety on urgent searches.

features.title: Icon cards
features.text: Each card has icon, title and supporting line.

features.title: Six default cards
features.text: Seed six; enable three for a tight row.

features.title: Emergency layout
features.text: Featured in the Emergency Response page preset below the hero.

partnerBenefits.title: Higher call rate
partnerBenefits.text: Clarifies response promise before the visitor picks up the phone.

partnerBenefits.title: 24/7 trades
partnerBenefits.text: Plumbers, locksmiths and electricians benefit most.

partnerBenefits.title: Simple copy
partnerBenefits.text: Partners edit three lines — no design work.

projectStats.name: Project Stats
projectStats.summary: Lead with "2,400+ jobs" or "15 years" — authority at a glance.
projectStats.pitch: Authority Builder layout centrepiece. Large stat values with labels — jobs completed, years operating, review count, emergency availability.

features.title: Six stat slots
features.text: Enable the stats that matter; hide the rest.

features.title: Big typography
features.text: Numbers render large for instant credibility scanning.

features.title: Authority layout
features.text: Pushed high on Authority Builder preset pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Established businesses
partnerBenefits.text: Perfect for mature trades competing against new entrants.

partnerBenefits.title: Ad landing pages
partnerBenefits.text: Stats improve trust on cold paid traffic.

partnerBenefits.title: Minimal maintenance
partnerBenefits.text: Numbers update once a year — set and forget.

serviceAreas.name: Service Areas Grid
serviceAreas.summary: Large suburb grid under the hero for local SEO.
serviceAreas.pitch: Service Area Dominator layout feature. Six or more suburb names in a grid — tells Google and visitors exactly where you operate.

features.title: Grid layout
features.text: Suburbs render in a responsive tag grid.

features.title: List editor
features.text: Add suburbs one by one — no comma-separated paste errors.

features.title: SEO layout
features.text: Featured early on Service Area Dominator preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Hyper-local ads
partnerBenefits.text: Match ad groups to the suburb list for quality score.

partnerBenefits.title: Franchise territories
partnerBenefits.text: Each franchisee lists their own suburbs.

partnerBenefits.title: Visual coverage
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors see their suburb and call immediately.

reviewHighlights.name: Review Highlights
reviewHighlights.tagline: Star-rated snippets directly under the hero
reviewHighlights.summary: Hit social proof before services on Reviews First layout.
reviewHighlights.pitch: Short quote snippets with star rating and name — three cards designed for the zone directly under the hero on Reviews First pages.

features.title: Star display
features.text: Five-star strings per highlight card.

features.title: Short quotes
features.text: Punchy one-liners — not full review walls.

features.title: Reviews First layout
features.text: Sits immediately below hero on the Reviews First preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Cold traffic
partnerBenefits.text: Paid search visitors see proof in the first scroll.

partnerBenefits.title: Pick your best three
partnerBenefits.text: Partners curate top Google snippets.

partnerBenefits.title: Complements full reviews
partnerBenefits.text: Use with the Reviews section lower on the page.

featuredProjects.name: Project Portfolio
featuredProjects.tagline: Large image cards for premium project showcase
featuredProjects.summary: Mini portfolio under the hero for high-end visual trades.
featuredProjects.pitch: Premium Showcase layout feature. Large project cards with title, type tag, location, description and optional gallery — built for builders, landscapers and renovators.

features.title: Project cards
features.text: Title, tag, location, description and image per project.

features.title: Image gallery
features.text: Multiple images per project with lightbox.

features.title: Head badges
features.text: Optional badge row for credentials above the grid.

partnerBenefits.title: High-ticket upsell
partnerBenefits.text: Premium trades pay for portfolio-first layouts.

partnerBenefits.title: AAM1 preset included
partnerBenefits.text: Playground ships with a real builder portfolio preset.

partnerBenefits.title: Lightbox built in
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors browse project photos without leaving the page.

specialOffer.name: Special Offer Banner
specialOffer.tagline: Limited-time offer strip for ad landing pages
specialOffer.summary: Bold offer between hero and quote on Offer Funnel layout.
specialOffer.pitch: Offer Funnel layout centrepiece. Eyebrow, heading, intro, bullet points and CTA — designed to pair with paid ads promoting a specific deal.

features.title: Bullet points
features.text: List what is included in the offer.

features.title: CTA button
features.text: Drives straight into the quote form below.

features.title: Offer Funnel layout
features.text: Sits between hero and quote on ad landing pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Seasonal campaigns
partnerBenefits.text: Partners update monthly specials without a redesign.

partnerBenefits.title: Urgency copy
partnerBenefits.text: "Book before Friday" style intro out of the box.

partnerBenefits.title: Measurable ROI
partnerBenefits.text: Track form submits against offer changes.

trustBar.name: Trust Bar
trustBar.tagline: Scrolling badge strip under the hero
trustBar.summary: Licensed, insured, fixed pricing — instant credibility strip.
trustBar.pitch: Thin badge row that sits directly under the hero on most layouts. Toggle badges on/off — licensed, insured, 5-star, 24/7, family owned.

features.title: Eight badge slots
features.text: Enable the badges that apply; hide the rest.

features.title: Icon-free labels
features.text: Text badges load fast — no image assets required.

features.title: Auto-inserted
features.text: Inserts after hero in layout order when enabled.

partnerBenefits.title: Universal trust
partnerBenefits.text: Every trade benefits from license and insurance proof.

partnerBenefits.title: One-minute setup
partnerBenefits.text: Toggle defaults on and publish.

partnerBenefits.title: Works with all layouts
partnerBenefits.text: Compatible with classic and premium presets.

serviceProcess.name: How It Works
serviceProcess.summary: Show the journey from call to completed job.
serviceProcess.pitch: Five-step timeline — call, inspect, quote, complete, guarantee. Reduces anxiety for first-time customers who have not hired a tradie before.

features.title: Five steps
features.text: Title and body per step — reorderable list.

features.title: Process clarity
features.text: Especially valuable for renovation and quote-heavy trades.

features.title: Mid-page placement
features.text: Typically sits after services on classic layouts.

partnerBenefits.title: Higher quote quality
partnerBenefits.text: Educated visitors submit better job descriptions.

partnerBenefits.title: Franchise consistency
partnerBenefits.text: Every location shows the same proven process.

partnerBenefits.title: Editable per client
partnerBenefits.text: Some trades add "free inspection" or "clean up" steps.

certifications.name: Certifications
certifications.summary: Prove you are licensed, insured and industry-accredited.
certifications.pitch: Three accreditation cards with name, body, number and expiry — Master Plumbers, public liability, trade licence. Critical for regulated trades.

features.title: Three card slots
features.text: Name, description, licence number and expiry per card.

features.title: Optional images
features.text: Upload badge images or use text-only cards.

features.title: Regulated trades
features.text: Plumbing, gas, electrical and asbestos partners need this visible.

partnerBenefits.title: Compliance trust
partnerBenefits.text: Commercial clients check credentials before engaging.

partnerBenefits.title: Quick verification
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors screenshot credentials for strata managers.

partnerBenefits.title: Defaults included
partnerBenefits.text: Master Plumbers and liability insurance seeded.

finance.name: Finance Options
finance.tagline: Weekly payment callout for larger jobs
finance.summary: Let customers spread the cost of big jobs.
finance.pitch: Finance section with eyebrow, heading, weekly amount, period and disclaimer — pairs with third-party finance providers for kitchens, solar and renovations.

features.title: Weekly amount display
features.text: Show "from $38/week" style pricing.

features.title: Disclaimer field
features.text: Compliance text for finance terms.

features.title: CTA to quote
features.text: "Ask about finance" drives qualified enquiries.

partnerBenefits.title: Higher average job value
partnerBenefits.text: Enables partners to sell $5k+ jobs to hesitant buyers.

partnerBenefits.title: Solar & renovations
partnerBenefits.text: Particularly effective for solar, bathrooms and kitchens.

partnerBenefits.title: Set and forget
partnerBenefits.text: Amount updates when finance partner rates change.

estimateBuilder.name: Estimate Builder
estimateBuilder.summary: Visitors self-serve a price range before they call.
estimateBuilder.pitch: Multi-step estimate wizard with configurable options and min/max ranges per answer — blocked drains, hot water, urgency surcharges. Sets price expectations early.

features.title: Configurable steps
features.text: Group options by step — "What do you need?", "How urgent?"

features.title: Min/max ranges
features.text: Each answer adds to a running estimate range.

features.title: Disclaimer
features.text: "Guide only" text protects against fixed-price expectations.

partnerBenefits.title: Lead qualification
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors arrive on the phone with realistic budgets.

partnerBenefits.title: Fewer time-wasters
partnerBenefits.text: Price-sensitive leads self-filter before calling.

partnerBenefits.title: Nine default options
partnerBenefits.text: Seeded for plumbing — swap options per trade.

emergencyAvailability.name: Emergency Availability
emergencyAvailability.summary: Show when you are available for emergencies.
emergencyAvailability.pitch: Displays weekday and weekend hours, after-hours messaging and emergency CTA — critical for plumbers, locksmiths and electricians running 24/7 ads.

features.title: Schedule mode
features.text: Set open/close times per weekday and weekend.

features.title: Available now label
features.text: "Available now" or custom status when within hours.

features.title: After-hours copy
features.text: Separate message for outside business hours.

partnerBenefits.title: 24/7 ad campaigns
partnerBenefits.text: Matches Google Ads call extensions and emergency keywords.

partnerBenefits.title: Reduced hang-ups
partnerBenefits.text: Visitors know when to expect a callback.

partnerBenefits.title: Emergency CTA
partnerBenefits.text: Optional button — call or quote action.

serviceAreaMap.name: Service Area Map
serviceAreaMap.summary: Visual service area section for geographic trust.
serviceAreaMap.pitch: Eyebrow, heading and intro for a map-style coverage block — pair with suburb lists and area copy for geographic dominance.

features.title: Coverage intro
features.text: Explain ACT-wide or metro coverage in plain language.

features.title: Map-ready layout
features.text: Section styled for map embed or static coverage graphic.

features.title: Local trust
features.text: Visitors confirm you service their area before enquiring.

partnerBenefits.title: Multi-region partners
partnerBenefits.text: Duplicate per territory with different intro copy.

partnerBenefits.title: SEO support
partnerBenefits.text: Geographic keywords in heading and intro.

partnerBenefits.title: Complements suburb grid
partnerBenefits.text: Use with Service Areas for full geographic story.

navMenu.name: Navigation Menu
navMenu.tagline: Custom nav links — pills or underline style
navMenu.summary: Add a secondary navigation row to any page.
navMenu.pitch: Configurable nav with pill or underline style, left or centre alignment and custom link items — useful for multi-page sites and anchor links.

features.title: Style options
features.text: Pills or underline; left or centre alignment.

features.title: Custom links
features.text: Add label + URL pairs — internal anchors or external pages.

features.title: Off by default
features.text: Enable only when the client needs extra navigation.

partnerBenefits.title: Multi-service businesses
partnerBenefits.text: Link to separate service landing pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Anchor navigation
partnerBenefits.text: Jump to quote, services or reviews on long pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Partner control

textBox.summary: Long-form copy with optional image — about us, story, methodology.
textBox.pitch: Full-width or image-side text block with eyebrow, heading, intro and rich paragraph. Place after hero for "our story" or methodology content.

features.title: Image optional

features.title: Alignment control
features.text: Left or centre text alignment.

features.title: Token support

partnerBenefits.text: Partners add founder story or "why we started" copy.

partnerBenefits.title: Between sections

partnerBenefits.title: SEO content
partnerBenefits.text: Extra keyword-rich paragraph without a new page.

projectFeed.pitch: Manual or Instagram-sourced project cards with title, location, service, date and image — core of the Social Proof Feed layout.

features.title: Manual entries
features.text: Add jobs with title, location, service tag and date.

features.title: Sort & count

jobsFeed.summary: Shorter job cards optimised for the proof stream.

beforeAfterFeed.pitch: Feed-style before/after cards with title, location, time, caption and image pair — more entries than the static gallery, optimised for proof layouts.

features.title: Caption support

partnerBenefits.title: Social Proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Part of the full proof stack.

videoReels.pitch: Video cards with title, duration tag, thumbnail and external video URL — opens in new tab. Perfect for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts.

features.title: Thumbnail per reel
features.text: Upload or link a poster image.

features.title: External video link
features.text: YouTube, Instagram or Vimeo URLs.

features.title: Tag/duration
features.text: "0:42" or "New" labels per card.

partnerBenefits.title: Younger demographics
partnerBenefits.text: Trades building TikTok/Reels audiences.

partnerBenefits.title: Social Proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Video proof mixed with jobs and reviews.

partnerBenefits.title: No video hosting

activityTimeline.tagline: Chronological "what we are working on" feed
activityTimeline.summary: Timeline of current and recent activity.
activityTimeline.pitch: Vertical timeline with events — job started, quote sent, review received. Shows the business is active today, not a static brochure.

features.title: Event list
features.text: Title, detail and time per timeline event.

features.title: Live feel
features.text: "Working on blocked drain in Belconnen" style entries.

features.title: Social Proof layout
features.text: Pairs with Activity Counter and Proof Stream.

partnerBenefits.title: Busy signal
partnerBenefits.text: Commercial clients want active, not idle, suppliers.

partnerBenefits.title: Easy updates

partnerBenefits.title: Differentiator
partnerBenefits.text: Rare on competitor tradie templates.

customerReactions.tagline: Short reaction quotes in a feed format
customerReactions.summary: Quick customer reactions — lighter than full reviews.
customerReactions.pitch: Short reaction cards — "Called at 7am, fixed by 9" — designed for feed layouts where full review walls feel too heavy.

features.title: Compact quotes
features.text: One or two lines per reaction.

features.title: Name attribution
features.text: Customer first name or initial.

features.title: Feed optimised
features.text: Card size tuned for proof stream stacks.

partnerBenefits.title: Authentic voice
partnerBenefits.text: Sounds like real texts, not marketing copy.

partnerBenefits.title: Social Proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Mixed with jobs and video in proof feed.

partnerBenefits.title: Fast to collect
partnerBenefits.text: Partners paste SMS thank-yous after jobs.

proofStream.name: Proof Stream
proofStream.tagline: Mixed proof cards — jobs, reviews, video, before/after
proofStream.pitch: Single feed mixing job cards, photos, reviews, videos and before/afters — each with CTA. The centrepiece of the Social Proof Feed layout.

features.title: Six card types
features.text: Job, photo, review, video, before/after — per card.

features.title: Per-card CTA
features.text: Quote or call button on each proof item.

features.title: Mixed media
features.text: One feed instead of five separate sections.

partnerBenefits.title: Highest-converting layout
partnerBenefits.text: Social Proof Feed is the top preset for engagement.

partnerBenefits.title: Premium partner offer
partnerBenefits.text: Sell the full proof stack as a package.

partnerBenefits.title: CTA on every card
partnerBenefits.text: No dead-end proof — every item drives action.

activityCounter.name: Activity Counter
activityCounter.summary: "47 jobs this month" — animated busy counters.
activityCounter.pitch: Three large counters with value and label — jobs this month, active teams, years serving. Pairs with Split Hero and Activity Timeline.

features.title: Three counters
features.text: Number plus label per stat.

features.title: Big numbers
features.text: Large typography for scan-value.

features.title: Social Proof layout
features.text: Sits below Split Hero on proof-heavy pages.

partnerBenefits.title: Urgency without fakes
partnerBenefits.text: Real numbers partners update monthly.

partnerBenefits.title: Commercial trust
partnerBenefits.text: Facilities managers want volume proof.

partnerBenefits.title: Quick edit
partnerBenefits.text: Change three numbers — done.

crew.name: Meet the Team
crew.tagline: Team member cards with photo and role
crew.summary: Put faces to the business — owner and crew.
crew.pitch: Team member cards with name, role, specialty and photo — builds trust for residential clients who want to know who is coming to their door.

features.title: Three member slots
features.text: Add owner, senior tradie, apprentice — or whole crew.

features.title: Photo per member
features.text: Square headshots — optional but recommended.

features.title: Role & specialty
features.text: "Master plumber · Bathroom renovations" style detail.

partnerBenefits.title: Residential trust
partnerBenefits.text: Homeowners hire people, not logos.

partnerBenefits.title: Franchise teams
partnerBenefits.text: Show local crew, not stock photos.

partnerBenefits.title: Social Proof layout
partnerBenefits.text: Crew section on full proof preset pages.

members.name: Steve Mitchell
members.detail: 15 years across Canberra — bathrooms, hot water and emergency callouts.

members.name: Tom Harris
members.detail: Specialises in renovations and blocked drains.

members.name: Matt Nguyen
members.detail: Third-year apprentice — quality workmanship on every job.

instaGallery.name: Instagram Gallery
instaGallery.tagline: Grid of Instagram posts on your site
instaGallery.summary: Embed your Instagram grid without manual image uploads.
instaGallery.pitch: Pulls from connected Instagram or manual grid — eyebrow, heading, post count and column layout. Keeps the site fresh with social content.

features.title: Column control
features.text: 4-column desktop grid — responsive on mobile.

features.title: Post count
features.text: Show 4, 8 or 12 recent posts.

features.title: Instagram OAuth
features.text: Connect once in Command Centre — auto-sync path.

partnerBenefits.title: Fresh content
partnerBenefits.text: Site updates when they post — no manual uploads.

partnerBenefits.title: Visual trades
partnerBenefits.text: Landscapers, painters and builders with active grids.

partnerBenefits.title: Social proof
partnerBenefits.text: Real job photos from their actual account.

igProjectFeed.name: Instagram Project Feed
igProjectFeed.tagline: Instagram grid styled as project cards
igProjectFeed.summary: Instagram posts rendered as project cards with CTAs.
igProjectFeed.pitch: Like Project Feed but sourced from Instagram — title from caption, tag label, call and quote buttons with custom colours.

features.title: Card styling
features.text: Text colour, button colours and tag label configurable.

features.title: CTA buttons
features.text: Call now and Get a quote on each card.

features.title: Title source
features.text: Pull from caption or hide title.

partnerBenefits.title: Instagram-native trades
partnerBenefits.text: Clients already posting daily job photos.

partnerBenefits.title: Conversion focused
partnerBenefits.text: Unlike a plain grid — every card drives action.

partnerBenefits.title: Brand colours
partnerBenefits.text: Button colours match site theme tokens.
